app.title: Go Trippin'
app.tagline: Your journeys, organized and brought to life.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.reset_password_instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.check_inbox: Check your inbox for the password reset link.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
auth.email_confirm_text: Please check your inbox to confirm your email before logging in.
auth.no_account_switch: No account found with this email. Create one below.
auth.invalid_reset_link: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long

profile.title: Profile
profile.sign_in_required: You need to be signed in to view your profile.
profile.avatar_section_description: Select an existing avatar or upload a new one
profile.email_update_confirmation_sent: Confirmation email sent! Please check your new inbox to verify the change.
profile.email_update_confirmation_sent_dual: Confirmation links sent to both old and new email addresses. Please verify to complete the change.
profile.password_description: Set a password for your account to enable email/password sign in.
profile.password_change_note: A confirmation email will be sent to verify this change.
profile.password_update_confirmation_sent: Confirmation link sent! Please check your inbox to finalize the password change.
profile.password_same_as_old: New password must be different from your current password.
profile.password_already_set: Password is already set for this account.
profile.session_missing: Your session expired. Please sign in again and then set a new password.
profile.link_account_password_required: You must set a password before linking other accounts
profile.unlink_account_last_provider: Cannot unlink your only authentication method
profile.unlink_google_requires_email_signin: Sign in once with your email and password to add it as a login method; then you can unlink Google.
profile.unlink_google_created_with_google: You signed up with Google, so you can't unlink it.
profile.unlink_account_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink this account?
profile.confirm_email_description: Please check your inbox to complete your registration.
profile.tips_description: Replay the create-trip walkthrough from the beginning.
profile.avatar_file_size: File size must be less than 5MB
profile.session_refresh_failed_description: Your session may be stale — please reload if you experience issues.

under_development.title: Under development
under_development.message: This page is under development. Check back soon!

common.error_description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.

ai.title: Go Trippin' AI
ai.empty_reply: I'm sorry, something went wrong generating that reply. Could you try asking again or rephrasing your question?
ai.placeholder: Where do you want to go next?
ai.no_chats_yet: No chats yet. Start with "New chat".
ai.delete_chat_confirm: Delete this chat? This cannot be undone.

trips.no_trips_description: Start planning your next adventure by creating your first trip!
trips.create_tour_name_body: Give your trip a short, memorable name. You can change it later.
trips.route_step_ready_body: Next we’ll open the map-based route editor so you can sketch your trip from A to B. When you’re done there, your trip will be saved.
trips.route_step_ready_short: Add your first stop on the map — we'll create your trip when you do.
trips.trip_created_first_stop: Trip created — add more stops or continue.
trips.youre_all_set_description: Add more stops or tap the itinerary below.
trips.congrats_description: You've created your trip. Add more stops anytime from the map or view your itinerary.

trip_overview.route_tour_itinerary: Stops appear here. Drag to reorder, tap to edit dates.
trip_overview.route_tour_find_guide: Tap the ? button anytime to see these steps again.
trip_overview.route_tour_along: Once you have 2+ stops, tap the compass to find food, sights, and stays along the way.
trip_overview.route_tour_itinerary_pill: Tap here to open your list. Reorder stops and edit dates.
trip_overview.route_search_hint: Search for a place, then confirm on the map.
trip_overview.route_search_no_results: No places found. Try a different search.
trip_overview.route_search_confirm_hint: Check the map — is this the right location?
trip_overview.add_documents_description: Start adding documents to your trip. You can add photos, links, emails, notes and files.
trip_overview.invite_guests_description: Add frequent guests. They can view, add, edit and remove items, but you're the admin.
trip_overview.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{tripName}}? All trip data will be permanently removed.
trip_overview.route_along_empty: No suggestions yet for this part of the route.
trip_overview.route_set_first_stop: Set your first stop, then add destinations in order.
trip_overview.route_add_destinations_order: Stop 1 is your first stop. Add destinations in travel order.
trip_overview.no_activities_stop: No activities for this stop yet.

activity.room_placeholder: e.g. King Suite with Ocean View
activity.notes_placeholder: Add any extra notes, things to pack, or reminders...
activity.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this activity?

train_route.no_route_hint: Add at least one stop to your trip before creating transport entries.
train_route.add_route_first: Add a route first to place this activity. Go back and add stops.
train_route.select_stop_before_save: Select a route stop before saving.
train_route.auth_required: Authentication required. Please refresh or sign in again.
train_route.saved_to_timeline: Saved to timeline for this stop.

ui.sortable_cancel_hint: Sortable item is no longer over a droppable area. Press escape to cancel.

background_picker.title: Choose Image
background_picker.check_connection: Please check your connection and try again
background_picker.search_hint: Search for a city or destination

date_picker.title: Select Dates
date_picker.select_range: Select a date range for your trip

weather.add_stops_body: Your trip route has no locations yet. Add at least one stop and come back here.
weather.stop_error_title: Couldn’t fetch weather for this stop
weather.stop_error_hint_dates: This usually means the stop’s date range is invalid. Check arrival/departure dates.
